expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with multiple user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Notification Center",
  "branchName": "notification-center",
  "description": "Add a notification center with persisted read state, unread indicators, filtering, and clearing read notifications.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add notification read-state persistence",
      "description": "As a product team, I want notifications to persist read state per user so that read and unread status survives across sessions.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Notification storage tracks whether each notification is read for the current user",
        "Persisted read state remains available when the user starts a new session",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "db/migrations/add_notification_read_state.sql",
        "src/db/schema/notifications.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Add backend notification read-state update actions",
      "description": "As a user, I want to mark notifications read or unread so that the notification center reflects what I still need to review.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Backend actions toggle a notification between read and unread states",
        "Updated read state is returned consistently to notification queries",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/actions/update-notification-read-state.ts",
        "src/server/routes/notifications.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Add backend action to clear all read notifications",
      "description": "As a user, I want to clear read notifications so that old completed items no longer clutter my notification history.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Clear action removes or archives only notifications already marked read",
        "Unread notifications remain available after a clear operation",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/actions/clear-read-notifications.ts",
        "src/server/routes/notifications.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Show unread notification badge",
      "description": "As a user, I want an unread badge so that I can see at a glance when new notifications need attention.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Application chrome displays unread notification count badge when unread items exist",
        "Unread badge count updates after read-state changes and clear actions",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/navigation/notification-badge.tsx",
        "src/components/navigation/app-header.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Add notification center list surface",
      "description": "As a user, I want to open a notification list so that I can review notifications from a dedicated center.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Users can open the notification center and see a list of notifications with current read state",
        "Notification list reflects persisted read-state changes without stale rows",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/pages/notifications/index.tsx",
        "src/components/notifications/notification-list.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-006",
      "title": "Add read-state filter and clear-read controls",
      "description": "As a user, I want to filter notifications by read state and clear read items so that I can focus on what still matters.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Notification center offers All, Unread, and Read filters",
        "Clear read control removes read items from the list after confirmation and refresh",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/notifications/notification-filters.tsx",
        "src/components/notifications/notification-list.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 6,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover persistence, badge or list UI, read-state updates, filtering, and clearing read notifications.
